title: Local mustard produces and transformed on the farm
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is SWITZERLAND 2. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 18 CH2. The VC is composed only of farms, which produce, process and sell the resource directly on the farm. Some external and local inputs are used for colouring and flavouring.

title: Mountain landscape and reference chains
description: The reference mountain chain of this VC is Jura. The reference mountain landscape of this VC is Tévenon. The MLR is a region composed of limestone rocks, which are permeable and have difficulty retaining water, forming a succession of shallow valleys and high plateaus. It is covered by forest and wooded pasture. Milk and cheese production are the first agricultural resource of the massif. Temperature vary strongly between summer and winter and the annual rainfall are abundant ( 1000 mm). Clock-making by farmers in the form of peasant clockmakers has been practiced since the Middle Ages and offers a cultural heritage to the region.
